# MIKHAIL VOLKOV

> [!danger] ACTIVE THREAT — UNKNOWN LEVEL

Dmitri's older brother. [[Dame]]'s uncle. Incoming to London.

---

## WHAT IS KNOWN

- Dmitri Volkov is dead (70 shots)
- A 17-year-old in London is wearing the Volkov name on his back
- That 17-year-old just released a track publicly confessing to a murder — the victim saw the name *A. Reyes-Volkov* before dying
- Mikhail Volkov is coming to London

---

## WHAT IS NOT KNOWN

- His relationship to Angel (his dead brother's stepson claiming the name)
- His intentions
- His resources
- Whether he views Angel as legacy or liability
- Whether he views [[Dame]] as family or complication
- His ETA

---

## THE UNCERTAINTY

He could be coming to protect. He could be coming to reclaim. He could be coming because the Volkov name is in the news and someone in Russia is paying attention. He could be coming because he loved his brother and needs to see the boy who carries him forward.

None of this is resolved. All of it is active.

---

## CONNECTS TO
- [[Dmitri Volkov]] — his younger brother
- [[Dame]] — his niece
- [[Angel Reyes]] — carries the name
- [[Active Tensions]] — listed as FUSE BURNING
